top_signals.title: China’s gold market cools amid ETF outflows: report
top_signals.summary: Chinese gold exchange-traded funds recorded their first monthly outflows since August 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says SpaceX’s blockbuster IPO could have major implications for the week ahead
top_signals.summary: CNBC’s Jim Cramer said the successful debut of SpaceX could pave the way for more AI-related offerings and help create a more constructive backdrop for stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
